'''vabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubwards|pubwards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubwards|pubwards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vabate|vabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vabatesher|vabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vabatesherĂ«m|vabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vabatero|vabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vabateshĂ«|vabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vabateshĂ«m|vabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivabatero|gokivabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivabateshĂ«|gokivabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivabateshĂ«m|gokivabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govabankerom|govabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govabankeshĂ«|govabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govabankeshĂ«m|govabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govabankeya|govabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vabaterom|vabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vabatemu|vabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vabateya|vabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivabaterom|gokivabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivabatemu|gokivabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivabateya|gokivabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vababate|vababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vababatesher|vababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vababatesherĂ«m|vababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vababatero|vababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vababateshĂ«|vababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vababateshĂ«m|vababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivababatero|gokivababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivababateshĂ«|gokivababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivababateshĂ«m|gokivababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govababankerom|govababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govababankeshĂ«|govababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govababankeshĂ«m|govababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govababankeya|govababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vababaterom|vababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vababatemu|vababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vababateya|vababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivababaterom|gokivababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivababatemu|gokivababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivababateya|gokivababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠte|vĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠtesher|vĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠtero|vĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠtero|gokivĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠbĂŠnkerom|govĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠbĂŠnkeya|govĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠterom|vĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠtemu|vĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠbĂŠteya|vĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠterom|gokivĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠbĂŠteya|gokivĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafbafte|vafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafbaftesher|vafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafbaftesherĂ«m|vafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafbaftero|vafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafbafteshĂ«|vafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafbafteshĂ«m|vafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafbaftero|gokivafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafbafteshĂ«|gokivafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafbafteshĂ«m|gokivafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafbafnkerom|govafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafbafnkeshĂ«|govafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafbafnkeshĂ«m|govafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafbafnkeya|govafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafbafterom|vafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafbaftemu|vafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafbafteya|vafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafbafterom|gokivafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafbaftemu|gokivafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafbafteya|gokivafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
